overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character and small companion traversing a rocky canyon at night, approaching an industrial facility. The character runs through narrow passages and open desert terrain toward a lit structure with restricted access.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with high walls

events.description: exits narrow canyon into wider desert basin

agents.ego_description: running through narrow canyon passage with small companion creature following closely behind

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon wall forming the left boundary of the passage
tall rocky canyon wall forming the right boundary of the passage
illuminated sign indicating private hangar facility in the distance
tall pointed rock formation visible at the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow canyon passage with high rock walls on both sides. A sign indicating 'PRIVATE HANGAR' is visible in the distance as the canyon begins to open up toward the desert beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert basin approaching industrial facility

events.description: character stops running and stands still to observe the facility ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing open desert terrain toward distant facility lights, then pausing to survey the area with companion waiting nearby

entered.detail: massive rock wall running along the left side of the path
bright artificial lights illuminating the distant industrial facility
large industrial complex with multiple structures and lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving across open desert terrain toward a distant industrial facility with bright floodlights. The character pauses to observe the facility before continuing the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility entrance with security lighting and restricted access

events.description: enters restricted area, warning text appears on screen
approaches facility door with illuminated control panel

agents.ego_description: approaching facility entrance at running speed, moving past cargo containers toward the main door with companion following

entered.detail: large dark industrial structure with metal walls and security lighting
large metal entrance door with control panel on the right side
black rectangular cargo containers scattered near the building entrance
bright floodlights mounted on poles illuminating the approach area

segments.scene_description: The character enters the restricted area and approaches the facility entrance, moving past cargo containers toward a large metal door with security lighting and access controls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a narrow rocky canyon into the open expanse of an industrial desert facility. It begins with the character sprinting through a tight passage flanked by high rock walls, moving toward a distant sign for a private hangar as the terrain begins to widen. As the canyon opens up, the scene shifts to a vast desert landscape where the character pauses to observe a distant facility illuminated by bright floodlights. The camera then follows the approach into the restricted area, gliding past scattered cargo containers before finally arriving at a large metal door equipped with security lighting and access controls.
